response.justification: Maria is a strong generalist engineer with 15+ years across web, mobile, and systems domains, but falls significantly short of the core requirements for this role. The position requires 8+ years of production AI development; her only documented GenAI work began in April 2025 — one month of experience at the time of her current role. Python, the primary language for AI engineering, is entirely absent from her listed skills. There is no mention of RAG architectures, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/optimization, which are explicit requirements. Her MCP work at re:cinq is genuinely relevant and promising, but it does not compensate for the depth gap at the Staff level.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise backed by Staff-level titles across multiple organizations
Direct hands-on experience building Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — directly aligned with the role's key technologies
Demonstrated technical leadership through conference talks, full-day workshops, and open-source project ownership
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the skills list despite being the primary required language for AI engineering in this role
No demonstrated experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, or LLM performance metrics — all listed as required or preferred qualifications
AI/GenAI experience is effectively brand new (April 2025), not the 8+ years of production-grade AI solution delivery the role mandates
